text.en: His Supplication when Faced with a Worrisome Task

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ تُحَلُّ بِهِ عُقَدُ الْمَكَارِهِ،
segments.transliteration: ya man tuḥallu bihi ʿuqadu l-makārih,

translation.en: O You by Whom the knots of difficulties are undone,

segments.arabic: وَيَا مَنْ يُفْثَأُ بِهِ حَدُّ الشَّدَائِدِ،
segments.transliteration: wa ya man yufthaʾu bihi ḥaddu l-shadāʾid,

translation.en: And O You by Whom the extremes of hardships are removed,

segments.arabic: وَيَا مَنْ يُلْتَمَسُ مِنْهُ الْمَخْرَجُ إِلَى رَوْحِ الْفَرَجِ،
segments.transliteration: wa ya man yultamasu minhu al-makhraju ilā rawḥi l-faraj,

translation.en: And O You from Whom a way to relief is sought,
The difficulties have yielded to Your power,
And the means have been facilitated by Your kindness,
And by Your power, the decree proceeds,
And all things move according to Your will,
So by Your command, they act without speaking,
And by Your will, they are restrained without Your prohibition,
You are the one called upon for important matters,
And You are the refuge in calamities,

segments.arabic: لَا يَنْدَفِعُ مِنْهَا إِلَّا مَا دَفَعْتَ،
segments.transliteration: lā yandafiʿu minhā illā mā dafaʿta,

translation.en: Nothing is removed from them except by Your removal,

segments.arabic: وَلَا يَنْكَشِفُ مِنْهَا إِلَّا مَا كَشَفْتَ،
segments.transliteration: wa lā yankashifu minhā illā mā kashfta,

translation.en: Nothing is revealed from them except what You unveil,

segments.arabic: وَقَدْ نَزَلَ بِي يَا رَبِّ مَا قَدْ تَكَأدَنيَّ ثِقْلُهُ،
segments.transliteration: wa qad nazala bī yā rabbi mā qad takaʾadaniyya thiqluhu,

translation.en: Indeed, O Lord, what has befallen me is almost unbearable,

segments.arabic: وَأَلَمَّ بِي مَا قَدْ بَهَظَنِي حَمْلُهُ،
segments.transliteration: wa allamma bī mā qad bahazani ḥamluhu,

translation.en: And the burden of it has caused me pain,
So bless Muhammad and his family,

segments.arabic: وَافْتَحْ لِي يَا رَبِّ بَابَ الْفَرَجِ بِطَوْلِكَ،
segments.transliteration: wa-iftaḥ lī yā rabbi bāba al-faraj bi-ṭawlik,

translation.en: And open for me, O Lord, the door of relief by Your power,
And break from me the power of distress by Your strength,
And grant me good perception in what I complain of,
And let me taste the sweetness of good deeds in what I ask,

segments.arabic: وَهَبْ لِي مِنْ لَدُنْكَ رَحْمَةً وَفَرَجاً هَنِيئاً،
segments.transliteration: wa-hab lī min ladunka raḥmatan wa-farajan hanīʾan,

translation.en: And grant me from You mercy and a joyful relief,

segments.arabic: وَاجْعَلْ لِي مِنْ عِنْدِكَ مَخْرَجاً وَحِيّاً،
segments.transliteration: wa-jʿal lī min ʿindik makhrajan wa-ḥiyyan,

translation.en: And make for me from You a way out and guidance,

segments.arabic: وَلَا تَشْغَلْنِي بِالاهْتِمَامِ عَنْ تَعَاهُدِ فُرُوضِكَ وَاسْتِعْمَالِ سُنَّتِكَ،
segments.transliteration: wa-lā tashghalnī bil-ihtimām ʿan taʿāhudi furūḍika wa-istiʿmāli sunnatika,

translation.en: And do not occupy me with concern away from fulfilling Your obligations and following Your Sunnah,

segments.arabic: فَقَدْ ضِقْتُ لِمَا نَزَلَ بِي يَا رَبِّ ذَرْعاً،
segments.transliteration: fa-qad ḍiqqtu limā nazala bī yā rabbi dharʿan,

translation.en: Indeed, I am constrained by what has befallen me, O Lord,

segments.arabic: وَامْتَلَأْتُ بِحَمْلِ مَا حَدَثَ عَلَيَّ هَمّاً،
segments.transliteration: wa-imtalātu bi-ḥamli mā ḥadatha ʿalayya hamman,

translation.en: And I am filled with the burden of what has occurred to me,

segments.arabic: وَأَنْتَ الْقَادِرُ عَلَى كَشْفِ مَا مُنِيتُ بِهِ،
segments.transliteration: wa-anta al-qādiru ʿalā kashfi mā munītu bihi,

translation.en: And You are capable of removing what I am afflicted with,
And of averting what has befallen me,

segments.arabic: فَافْعَلْ بِي ذَلِكَ وَإِنْ لَمْ أَسْتَوْجِبْهُ مِنْكَ،
segments.transliteration: fa-ifʿal bī dhālika wa-in lam astawjibhu minka,

translation.en: So do this for me even if I have not deserved it from You,
O Possessor of the Great Throne."

text.en: His Supplication in Seeking Refuge from Hateful Things

translation.en: O Allah, bless Muhammad and his family,

segments.arabic: أَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ هَيَجَانِ الْحِرْصِ
segments.transliteration: Allāhumma innī a‘ūdhū bika min hayajāni al-ḥirṣi

translation.en: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from the fervor of greed

segments.arabic: وَسَوْرَةِ الْغَضَبِ وَغَلَبَةِ الْحَسَدِ وَضَعْفِ الصَّبْرِ
segments.transliteration: Wa sawrati al-ghaḍabi wa ghalabati al-ḥasadi wa ḍa‘fi aṣ-ṣabri

translation.en: And the surge of anger, the dominance of envy, and the weakness of patience

segments.transliteration: Wa qillati al-qanā‘ati wa shakāsati al-khuluqi

translation.en: And the lack of contentment, and the harshness of character

segments.transliteration: Wa ilḥāḥi ash-shahwati wa malakati al-ḥamiyyati

translation.en: And the insistence of desire, and the habit of zeal

segments.transliteration: Wa mutāba‘ati al-hawā wa mukhālafati al-hudā

translation.en: And following whims, and opposing guidance

segments.transliteration: Wa sinati al-ghaflati wa ta‘āṭi al-kulfati

translation.en: And the slumber of heedlessness, and undertaking burdens

segments.arabic: وَإِيثَارِ الْبَاطِلِ عَلَى الْحَقِّ وَالْإِصْرَارِ عَلَى الْمَأْثَمِ
segments.transliteration: Wa īthāri al-bāṭili ‘alā al-ḥaqqi wa al-iṣrāri ‘alā al-ma’thami

translation.en: And preferring falsehood over truth, and persisting in sin

segments.transliteration: Wa istiṣghāri al-ma‘ṣiyati wa istikthāri aṭ-ṭā‘ati

translation.en: And belittling disobedience, and exaggerating obedience

segments.transliteration: Wa mubāhāti al-mukthirīna wa al-izrā’i bil-muqillīna

translation.en: And vying with the wealthy, and showing contempt to the poor

segments.transliteration: Wa sū’i al-wilāyati liman taḥta aydīnā

translation.en: And poor guardianship over those under our care

segments.arabic: وَتَرْكِ الشُّكْرِ لِمَنِ اصْطَنَعَ الْعَارِفَةَ عِنْدَنَا
segments.transliteration: Wa tarki ash-shukri limani aṣṭana‘a al-‘ārifata ‘indanā

translation.en: And neglecting gratitude to those who showed kindness to us

segments.arabic: أَوْ أَنْ نَعْضُدَ ظَالِمًا أَوْ نَخْذُلَ مَلْهُوفًا
segments.transliteration: Aw an na‘ḍuda ẓāliman aw nakhdhula malhūfan

translation.en: Or supporting an oppressor, or abandoning the distressed

segments.arabic: أَوْ نَرُومَ مَا لَيْسَ لَنَا بِحَقٍّ
segments.transliteration: Aw narūma mā laysa lanā biḥaqqin

translation.en: Or seeking what is not rightfully ours

segments.arabic: أَوْ نَقُولَ فِي الْعِلْمِ بِغَيْرِ عِلْمٍ

translation.en: Or speaking about knowledge without knowledge

segments.arabic: وَنَعُوذُ بِكَ أَنْ نَنْطَوِيَ عَلَى غِشِّ أَحَدٍ
segments.transliteration: Wa na‘ūdhū bika an nantawiya ‘alā ghishshi aḥadin

translation.en: And we seek refuge in You from harboring deceit against anyone

segments.arabic: وَأَنْ نُعْجَبَ بِأَعْمَالِنَا وَنَمُدَّ فِي آمَالِنَا
segments.transliteration: Wa an nu‘jaba bi-a‘mālinā wa namudda fī āmālinā

translation.en: And from being pleased with our deeds, and prolonging our hopes

segments.arabic: وَنَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ سُوءِ السَّرِيرَةِ وَاحْتِقَارِ الصَّغِيرَةِ
segments.transliteration: Wa na‘ūdhū bika min sū’i as-sarīrati wa iḥtiqāri aṣ-ṣaghīrati

translation.en: And we seek refuge in You from evil intentions and belittling small sins
And from Satan gaining control over us

segments.arabic: أَوْ يَنْكُبَنَا الزَّمَانُ أَوْ يَتَهَضَّمَنَا السُّلْطَانُ
segments.transliteration: Aw yankubanā az-zamānu aw yatahaḍḍamanā as-sulṭānu

translation.en: Or from time afflicting us, or the ruler oppressing us

segments.arabic: وَنَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ تَنَاوُلِ الْإِسْرَافِ وَمِنْ فِقْدَانِ الْكَفَافِ
segments.transliteration: Wa na‘ūdhū bika min tanāwuli al-isrāfi wa min fiqdāni al-kafāfi

translation.en: And we seek refuge in You from indulging in excess and lacking sufficiency

segments.arabic: وَنَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَمَاتَةِ الْأَعْدَاءِ وَمِنَ الْفَقْرِ إِلَى الْأَكْفَاءِ
segments.transliteration: Wa na‘ūdhū bika min shamātati al-a‘dā’i wa mina al-faqri ilā al-akfā’i

translation.en: And from the gloating of enemies and poverty among peers

segments.arabic: وَمِنْ مَعِيشَةٍ فِي شِدَّةٍ وَمَيْتَةٍ عَلَى غَيْرِ عُدَّةٍ
segments.transliteration: Wa min ma‘īshatin fī shiddatin wa maytatin ‘alā ghayri ‘uddatin

translation.en: And from a life of hardship and a death without preparation

segments.transliteration: Wa na‘ūdhū bika mina al-ḥasrati al-‘uẓmā

translation.en: And we seek refuge in You from the greatest regret

segments.arabic: وَالْمُصِيبَةِ الْكُبْرَى وَأَشْقَى الشَّقَاءِ وَسُوءِ الْمَآبِ
segments.transliteration: Wa al-muṣībati al-kubrā wa ashqā ash-shaqā’i wa sū’i al-ma’ābi

translation.en: And the greatest calamity, the worst misery, and a bad end

segments.transliteration: Wa ḥirmāni ath-thawābi wa ḥulūli al-‘iqābi

translation.en: And deprivation of reward and the onset of punishment
O Allah, send blessings upon Muhammad and his family

segments.transliteration: Wa a‘idhni min kulli dhālika biraḥmatika

translation.en: And protect me from all of this by Your mercy
And all the believing men and believing women
O Most Merciful of the merciful

segments.arabic: أَللَّهُمَّ لَكَ الْحَمْدُ عَلَى مَا لَمْ أَزَلْ أَتَصَرَّفُ فِيهِ مِنْ سَلَامَةِ بَدَنِي
segments.transliteration: Allāhumma laka al-ḥamdu ‘alā mā lam azal atasarrafu fīhi min salāmati badanī

translation.en: O Allah, praise be to You for the health of my body that I continue to enjoy.

segments.arabic: وَلَكَ الْحَمْدُ عَلَى مَا أَحْدَثْتَ بِي مِنْ عِلَّةٍ فِي جَسَدِي
segments.transliteration: Wa laka al-ḥamdu ‘alā mā aḥdathta bī min ‘illatin fī jasadī

translation.en: And praise be to You for the illness You brought upon my body.

segments.arabic: فَمَا أَدْرِي يَا إِلَهِي أَيُّ الْحَالَيْنِ أَحَقُّ بِالشُّكْرِ لَكَ
segments.transliteration: Famā adrī yā ilāhī ayyu al-ḥālayni aḥaqqu bi-ash-shukri laka

translation.en: For I know not, O my God, which of the two states is more worthy of gratitude to You,

segments.transliteration: Wa ayyu al-waqtayni awlā bi-al-ḥamdi laka

translation.en: and which of the two times is more deserving of praise to You:

segments.arabic: أَوَقْتُ الصِّحَّةِ الَّتِي هَنَّأْتَنِي فِيهَا طَيِّبَاتِ رِزْقِكَ
segments.transliteration: Awaqtu aṣ-ṣiḥḥati allatī hanna’tanī fīhā ṭayyibāti rizqika

translation.en: The time of health, in which You delighted me with the good provisions,

segments.transliteration: Wa nashshaṭtanī bihā li-ibtighā’i marḍātika wa faḍlika

translation.en: and energized me with it to seek Your pleasure and Your favor,

segments.arabic: وَقَوَّيْتَنِي مَعَهَا عَلَى مَا وَفَّقْتَنِي لَهُ مِنْ طَاعَتِكَ
segments.transliteration: Wa qawwaytanī ma‘ahā ‘alā mā waffaqtanī lahu min ṭā‘atika

translation.en: and strengthened me with it for what You enabled me to do of Your obedience?

segments.arabic: أَمْ وَقْتُ الْعِلَّةِ الَّتِي مَحَّصْتَنِي بِهَا
segments.transliteration: Am waqtu al-‘illati allatī maḥḥaṣtanī bihā

translation.en: Or the time of illness, by which You purified me,

segments.arabic: وَالنِّعَمِ الَّتِي أَتْحَفْتَنِي بِهَا تَخْفِيفًا لِمَا ثَقُلَ بِهِ عَلَى ظَهْرِي مِنَ الْخَطِيئَاتِ
segments.transliteration: Wa an-ni‘ami allatī atḥaftanī bihā takhfīfan limā thaqula bihi ‘alā ẓahrī mina al-khaṭī’āti

translation.en: and the blessings You bestowed upon me to lighten what weighed heavily on my back of sins,

segments.arabic: وَتَطْهِيرًا لِمَا انْغَمَسْتُ فِيهِ مِنَ السَّيِّئَاتِ
segments.transliteration: Wa taṭhīran limā anghamastu fīhi mina as-sayyi’āti

translation.en: and to purify what I indulged in of misdeeds,
and as a reminder to seek repentance,

segments.transliteration: Wa tadhkīran limaḥwi al-ḥawbati biqadīmi an-ni‘mati

translation.en: and a reminder to erase sins with Your longstanding grace?

segments.arabic: وَفِي خِلَالِ ذَلِكَ مَا كَتَبَ لِيَ الْكَاتِبَانِ مِنْ زَكِيِّ الْأَعْمَالِ
segments.transliteration: Wa fī khilāli dhālika mā kataba liya al-kātibāni min zakiyyi al-a‘māli

translation.en: And amidst that, what the two angels recorded for me of pure deeds,

segments.arabic: مَا لَا قَلْبٌ فَكَّرَ فِيهِ وَلَا لِسَانٌ نَطَقَ بِهِ وَلَا جَارِحَةٌ تَكَلَّفَتْهُ
segments.transliteration: Mā lā qalbun fakkara fīhi wa lā lisānun naṭaqa bihi wa lā jāriḥatun takallafathu

translation.en: which no heart conceived, nor tongue uttered, nor limb undertook,

segments.arabic: بَلْ إِفْضَالًا مِنْكَ عَلَيَّ وَإِحْسَانًا مِنْ صَنِيعِكَ إِلَيَّ
segments.transliteration: Bal ifḍālan minka ‘alayya wa iḥsānan min ṣanī‘ika ilayya

translation.en: but as a favor from You upon me, and kindness from Your doing toward me.
O Allah, send blessings on Muhammad and his family,

segments.transliteration: Wa ḥabbib ilayya mā raḍīta lī

translation.en: and make beloved to me what You have decreed for me,

segments.transliteration: Wa yassir lī mā aḥlalta bī

translation.en: and ease for me what You have brought upon me,

segments.transliteration: Wa ṭahhirnī min danasi mā aslaftu

translation.en: and purify me from the taint of what I have committed,
and erase from me the evil of what I have sent forth.
And grant me the sweetness of well-being,
and let me taste the coolness of safety.

segments.arabic: وَاجْعَلْ مَخْرَجِي عَنْ عِلَّتِي إِلَى عَفْوِكَ

translation.en: And make my escape from my illness to Your pardon,
and my transition from my affliction to Your forbearance,

segments.transliteration: Wa khalāṣī min karbī ilā rawḥika

translation.en: and my deliverance from my distress to Your relief,

segments.arabic: وَسَلَامَتِي مِنْ هَذِهِ الشِّدَّةِ إِلَى فَرَجِكَ
segments.transliteration: Wa salāmatī min hādhihi ash-shiddati ilā farajika

translation.en: and my safety from this hardship to Your ease.

segments.arabic: إِنَّكَ الْمُتَفَضِّلُ بِالْإِحْسَانِ الْمُتَطَوِّلُ بِالِامْتِنَانِ الْوَهَّابُ الْكَرِيمُ ذُو الْجَلَالِ وَالْإِكْرَامِ
segments.transliteration: Innaka al-mutafaḍḍilu bi-al-iḥsāni al-mutaṭawwilu bi-al-imtināni al-wahhābu al-karīmu dhū al-jalāli wa al-ikrāmi

translation.en: For You are the Benefactor with kindness, the Bountiful with grace, the Generous Giver, Possessor of majesty and honor.

text.en: His Supplication for Noble Moral Traits (Makarem al-Akhlaq)

translation.en: In the Name of Allah, the All-merciful, the All-compassionate
O Allah, bless Muhammad and his Household,
cause my faith to reach the most perfect faith,
make my certainty the most excellent certainty,

segments.arabic: وَانتَهِ بِنِيَّتِي إِلَى أَحْسَنِ النِّيَّاتِ، وَبِعَمَلِي إِلَى أَحْسَنِ الأَعْمَاِل
segments.transliteration: wantahi bi-ni-yati ila ah-san-ni-yati wa bi-a'mali ila ah-sanil-a'-mal

translation.en: and take my intention to the best of intentions, and my works to the best of works!
O Allah,
complete my intention through Your gentleness,
rectify my certainty through what is with You,
And set right what is corrupt in me through Your power!
O Allah, bless Muhammad and his Household,
spare me the concerns which distract me,
employ me in that about which You will ask me tomorrow,
And let me pass my days in that for which You hast created me!

segments.transliteration: wa agh-nini wa aw-sia' a'lay-ya fi rizqik

translation.en: Free me from need, and expand Your provision toward me,
And tempt me not with ingratitude!

segments.transliteration: wa ai'z-za ni wa-la tab-tali-yani-y bil-kib-r

translation.en: Exalt me and afflict me not with pride!

segments.arabic: وَعَبِّدْنِي لَكَ وَلا تُفْسِدْ عِبِادَتِي بِالعُجْبِ
segments.transliteration: wa a'b-bid-ni laka wa-la tuf-sid i'bidati bil-u'j-b

translation.en: Make me worship You and corrupt not my worship with self-admiration!

segments.arabic: وَأَجْرِ لِلنَّاسِ عَلَى يَدَيَّ الْخَيْرَ وَلا تَمْحَقْهُ بِالْمَنِّ
segments.transliteration: wa aj-ri lin-nasi a'la yaday-yal-khayra wa-la tam-haq-hu bil-man-n

translation.en: Let good flow out from my hands upon the people and efface it not by my making them feel obliged!
Give me the highest moral traits
And preserve me from vainglory!
O Allah, bless Muhammad and his Household,

segments.arabic: وَلا تَرْفَعْنِي فِي النَّاسِ دَرَجَةً إِلا حَطَطْتَنِي عِندَ نَفْسِي مِثْلَهَا
segments.transliteration: wa la tar-fa'-ni fin-nasi darajatan il-la hatat-tani i'nda naf-si mith-laha

translation.en: raise me not a single degree before the people without lowering me its like in myself

segments.arabic: وَلا تُحْدِثْ لِي عِزّاً ظَاهِراً إِلاَّ أَحْدَثْتَ لِي ذِلَّةً بَاطِنَةً عِندَ نَفْسِي بِقَدَرِهَا
segments.transliteration: wa-la tuh-dith li i'z-zan zahiran il-la ah-dath-ta li dhil-latam batinatan i'nda naf-si biqadariha

translation.en: And bring about no outward exaltation for me without an inward abasement in myself to the same measure!

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلى مُحَمَّدٍ وَّآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma sal-li a'la muhammadiw-wa a-li muhammad

translation.en: O Allah, bless Muhammad and Muhammad's Household,

segments.arabic: وَمَتِّعْنِي بِهُدَىً صَاِلحٍ لا أَسْتَبْدِلُ بِهِ،
segments.transliteration: wa mat-tia'-ni bihudan salihil-la as-tabdilu bih

translation.en: give me to enjoy a sound guidance which I seek not to replace,
a path of truth from which I swerve not,
And an intention of right conduct in which I have no doubts!

segments.arabic: وَعَمِّرْنِي مَا كَانَ عُمْرِي بِذْلَةً فِي طَاعَتِكَ، فَإِذَا كَانَ عُمْرِي مَرْتَعاً لِلشَّيْطَانِ فَاقْبِضْنِي إِلَيْكَ، قَبْلَ أَن يَّسْبِقَ مَقْتُكَ إِلَيَّ، أَوْ يَسْتَحْكِمَ غَضَبُكَ عَلَيَّ
segments.transliteration: wa a'mmir-ni ma kana u'm-ri bidhlatan fi ta'tika fa-idha kana u'm-ri mar-ta'al-lish-shaytani faq-bizni ilayka qab-la ayyasbiqa maq-tuka ilay-ya aw yas-tah-kima ghazabuka a'lay-ya

translation.en: Let me live as long as my life is a free gift in obeying You, but if my life should become a pasture for Satan, seize me to Yourself before Your hatred overtakes me or Your wrath against be becomes firm!
O Allah,

segments.arabic: لا تَدَعْ خِصْلَةً تُعَابُ مِنِّي إِلاَّ أَصْلَحْتَهَا
segments.transliteration: la tada' khas-latan tua'abu min-ni il-la as-lah-taha

translation.en: deposit in me no quality for which I will be faulted, unless You settest it right,

segments.arabic: وَلا عَائِبَةً أُؤَنَّبُ بِهَا إِلاَّ حَسَّنتَهَا،
segments.transliteration: wa-la a'a-ibatan uan-nabu biha il-la has-santaha

translation.en: no flaw for which I will be blamed, unless You makest it beautiful,

segments.arabic: وَلا أُكْرُومَةً فِيَّ نَاقِصَةً إِلاَّ أَتْمَمْتَهَا
segments.transliteration: wa-la uk-rumatan fi-ya naqisatan il-la at-mam-taha

translation.en: And no deficient noble trait, unless You completest it!

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَّآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma sal-li a'la muhammadiw-wa a-li muhammad

translation.en: O Allah, bless Muhammad and Muhammad's Household,

segments.arabic: وَأَبْدِلْنِي مِنْ بُغْضَةِ أَهْلِ الشَّنَانَ الْمَحَبَّةَ

translation.en: and replace for me the animosity of the people of hatred with love,
the envy of the people of insolence with affection,
the suspicion of the people of righteousness with trust,
the enmity of those close with friendship,
the disrespect of womb relatives with devotion,
the abandonment of relatives with help,
the attachment of flatterers with love set right,
the rejection of fellows with generous friendliness,

segments.arabic: وَمِن مَّرَارَةِ خَوْفِ الظَّالِمِينَ حَلاَوَةَ الأَمنَةَ

translation.en: And the bitterness of the fear of wrongdoers with the sweetness of security!
O Allah, bless Muhammad and his Household,

segments.arabic: وَاجْعَل لِّي يَداً عَلى مَن ظَلَمَنِي،

translation.en: appoint for me a hand against him who wrongs me,
a tongue against him who disputes with me,
And a victory over him who stubbornly resists me!

segments.arabic: وَهَبْ لِي مَكْراً عَلَى مَن كَايَدَنِي،
segments.transliteration: wa hab li mak-ran a'la man kayadani

translation.en: Give me guile against him who schemes against me,
power over him who oppresses me,
refutation of him who reviles me,
And safety from him who threatens me!
Grant me success to obey him who points me straight
And follow him who guides me right!
O Allah, bless Muhammad and his Household
and point me straight to
resist him who is dishonest toward me without counsel,
repay him who separates from me with gentle devotion,
reward him who deprives me with free giving,
recompense him who cuts me off with joining,

segments.arabic: وَأُخَاِلفَ مَنْ اغْتَابَنِي إِلَى حُسْنِ الذِّكْرِ،

translation.en: oppose him who slanders me with excellent mention,
give thanks for good,
And shut my eyes to evil!
O Allah, bless Muhammad and his Household,
adorn me with the adornment of the righteous,
And clothe me in the ornaments of the god-fearing, through:
spreading justice,
restraining rage,
quenching the flame of hate,
bringing together the people of separation,
correcting discord,
spreading about good behavior,
covering faults,
mildness of temper,
lowering the wing,
beauty of conduct,
gravity of bearing,
agreeableness in comportment,
precedence in reaching excellence,
preferring bounteousness,
refraining from condemnation,
bestowing bounty on the undeserving,
speaking the truth, though it be painful,

segments.arabic: وَاسْتِقْلاَلِ الْخَيْرِ وَإِن كَثُرَ مِن قَوْلِي وَفِعْلِي
segments.transliteration: was-tiq-lalil-khayri wa in kathura min qaw-li wa fia'-li

translation.en: making little of the good in my words and deeds, though it be much,

segments.arabic: وَاسْتِكْثَارِ الْشَّرِ وَإِن قلَّ مِن قَوْلِي وَفِعْلِي
segments.transliteration: was-tik-tharish-shari wa in ql-la min qaw-li wa fia'-li

translation.en: And making much of the evil in my words and deeds, though it be little!
Perfect this for me through
lasting obedience,
holding fast to the community,

segments.arabic: وَرَفْضِ أَهْلِ الْبِدَعِ، وَمُسْتَعْمِلِي الرَّأْيِ الْمُخْتَرَعِ

translation.en: And rejecting the people of innovation and those who act in accordance with original opinions.
O Allah, bless Muhammad and his Household,

segments.arabic: وَاجْعَلْ أَوْسَعَ رِزْقِكَ عَلَيَّ إِذَا كَبِرْتُ،
segments.transliteration: waj-a'l aw-sa' rizqika a'lay-ya idha kabir-tu

translation.en: appoint for me Your widest provision in my old age

segments.transliteration: wa aq-wa qu-watika fi-ya idha nasib-tu

translation.en: And Your strongest strength when I am exhausted,
And try me not with laziness in worship of You,
blindness toward Your path,
undertaking what opposes love for You,
joining with him who has separated himself from You,
And separating from him who has joined himself to You!

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اجْعَلْنِي أَصُولُ بِكَ عِندَ الضَّرُورَةِ،

translation.en: O Allah, make me leap to You in times of distress,
ask from You in needs,
And plead to You in misery!

segments.arabic: وَلا تَفْتِنِّي بِالإِسْتِعَانَةِ بِغَيْرِكَ إِذَا اضْطُرِرْتُ،

translation.en: Tempt me not to seek help from other than You when I am distressed,

segments.arabic: وَلا بِالْخُضُوعِ لِسُؤَاِل غَيْرِكَ إِذَا افْتَقَرْتُ،

translation.en: to humble myself in asking from someone else when I am poor,

segments.arabic: وَلا بِالتَّضَرُّعِ إِلَى مَن دُونِكَ إِذَارَهِبْتُ
segments.transliteration: wa-la bit-tazar-rui' ila man dunaka idharahib-tu

translation.en: or to plead with someone less than You when I fear,

segments.transliteration: fas-tahiq-qu bidhlika khidhlanaka wa man-a'ka wa ia'-razak

translation.en: for then I would deserve Your abandonment, Your withholding, and Your turning away,
O Most Merciful of the merciful!

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اجْعَلْ مَا يُلْقِي الشَّيْطَانُ فِي رَوْعِي منِ التَّمَنِّي وَالتَّظَنِّي وَالْحَسَدِذِكْراً لِعَظَمَتِكَ، وَتَفَكُّراً فِي قُدْرَتِكَ، وَتَدْبِيراً عَلَى عَدُوِّكَ،
segments.transliteration: allahummaj-a'l ma yul-qish-shaytanu fi raw-e'e mint-taman-ni wat-tazan-ni wal-hasadidhik-ral-li-a'zamatika wa tafak-kuran fi qud-ratika wa tad-biran a'la a'du-wika

translation.en: O Allah, make the wishing, the doubt, and the envy which Satan throws into my heart a remembrance of Your mightiness, a reflection upon Your power, and a devising against Your enemy!

segments.arabic: وَمَا أَجْرَى عَلَى لِسَانِى مِن لَّفْظَةِ فُحْشٍ أَوْ هَجْرٍ أَوْ شَتْمِ عِرْضٍ أَوْ شَهَادَةِ بَاطِلٍ أَوِ اغْتِيَابِ مُؤْمِنٍ غَائِبٍ أَوْ سَبِّ حَاضِرٍ أَوْ مَا أَشْبَهَ ذَلِكَ،
segments.transliteration: wa ma aj-ra a'la li-sani mil-laf-zati fuh-shin aw haj-rin aw shat-mi i'r-zin aw shahadati batilin awigh-tiyabi mu-minin gha-ibin aw sab-bi hazirin aw ma ash-baha dhalika

translation.en: Make everything he causes to pass over my tongue - the indecent or ugly words, the maligning of good repute, the false witness, the speaking ill of an absent man of faith, or the reviling of one present, and all things similar—
a speech in praise of You,
a pursual of eulogizing You,
an excursion in magnifying You,
a thanksgiving for Your favour,
an acknowledgment of Your beneficence,
And an enumeration of Your kindness!
O Allah, bless Muhammad and his Household,

segments.arabic: وَلا أُظْلَمَنَّ وَأَنتَ مُطِيقٌ لِّلدَّفْعِ عَنِّي
segments.transliteration: wa-la uzlaman-na wa anta mutiqul-lid-daf-i' a'n-ni

translation.en: let me not be wronged, while You canst repel from me,

segments.arabic: وَلا أَظْلِمَنَّ وَأَنتَ الْقَادِرُ عَلى الْقَبْضِ مِنِّي
segments.transliteration: wa-la azliman-na wa antal-qadiru a'lil-qab-zi min-ni

translation.en: let me not do wrong, while You are powerful over holding me back,

segments.transliteration: wa-la azil-lan-na wa qad am-kanat-ka hidayati

translation.en: let me not be misguided, while You are able to guide me,

segments.transliteration: wa-la af-taqiran-na wa min i'ndika wus-e'e

translation.en: let me not be poor, while with You is my plenty,

segments.transliteration: wa-la at-ghayan-na wa min i'ndika wuj-di

translation.en: let me not be insolent, while from You comes my wealth!
O Allah,
I come to Your forgiveness,
I go straight to Your pardon,
I yearn for Your forbearance,
And I trust in Your bounty,

segments.arabic: وَلَيْسَ عِندِي مَا يُوجِبُ لِي مَغْفِرَتَكَ
segments.transliteration: wa laysa i'ndi ma yujibu li magh-firatak

translation.en: but there is nothing with me to make me warrant but Your forgiveness,

segments.arabic: وَلا فِي عَمَلِي مَا أَسْتَحِقُّ بِهِ عَفْوَكَ
segments.transliteration: wa-la fi a'mali ma as-tahiq-qu bihi a'f-wak

translation.en: nothing in my works to make me merit but Your pardon,

segments.arabic: وَمَا لِي بَعْدَ أَنْ حَكَمْتُ عَلَى نَفْسِي إلاَّ فَضْلُكَ
segments.transliteration: wa ma li ba'-da an hakam-tu a'la naf-si il-la fazluka

translation.en: And nothing on my behalf after I judge my soul but Your bounty,
O Allah, bless Muhammad and his Household
O Allah, bestow Your bounty upon me!
make my speech be guidance,
inspire me with reverential fear,
give me success in that which is most pure,
And employ me in what is most pleasing to You!
O Allah, let me tread the most exemplary path

segments.transliteration: waj-a'l-ni a'la mil-latika amutu wa ah-ya

translation.en: And make me live and die in Your creed!
O Allah, bless Muhammad and his Household,
give me to enjoy moderation,
make me into one of the people of right behavior,
the proofs of right conduct,
And the servants of righteousness,
And provide me with triumph at the place of Return
And safety from the Ambush!
O Allah,

segments.arabic: خُذْ لِنَفْسِكَ مِن نَّفْسِي مَا يُخَلِّصُهَا

translation.en: take to Yourself from my soul what will purify it

segments.arabic: وَأَبْقِ لِنَفْسِي مِن نَّفْسِي مَا يُصْلِحُهَا،
segments.transliteration: wa ab-qi linaf-si min-naf-si ma yus-lihuha

translation.en: And leave for my soul that of my soul that will set it right,
for my soul will perish unless You preservest it!
O Allah,
You are my stores when I sorrow,
You are my recourse when I am deprived,
from You I seek aid when troubled
and with You is a substitute for everything gone by,
a correction for everything corrupted,
a change from everything You is approvest.
So show kindness to me with well-being before affliction,
wealth before asking,
right conduct before misguidance;
suffice me against the burden of shame toward the servants,
give me security on the Day of Return,
And grant me excellent right guidance!
O Allah, bless Muhammad and his Household,
repel from me through Your gentleness,
feed me through Your favour,
set me right through Your generosity,
heal me through Your benefaction,
shade me in Your shelter,
wrap me in Your good pleasure,

segments.arabic: وَوَفِّقْنِي إِذَا اشْتَكَلَتْ عَلَيَّ الأُمُورُ لأَهْدَاهَا،

translation.en: And give me success to reach the most guided of affairs when affairs confuse me,
the purest of works when works seem similar,
and the most pleasing to You of creeds when creeds conflict!
O Allah, bless Muhammad and his Household,
crown me with sufficiency,
place in me excellent guardianship
give me to guide correctly ,
tempt me not with plenty,
grant me excellent ease,
make not my life toil and trouble,
And refuse not my supplication in rejection,
for I make none rival to You
And I supplicate none with You as equal!
O Allah, bless Muhammad and his Household,
hold me back from prodigality,
fortify my provision against ruin,
increase my possessions through blessing them,

segments.arabic: وَأَصِبْ بِي سَبِيلَ الْهِدَايَةِ لِلْبِرِّ فِيمَا أُنفِقُ مِنْهُ
segments.transliteration: wa asib bi sabilal-hidayati lil-bir-ri fima unfiqu minh

translation.en: And set me upon the path of guidance through piety in what I spend!
O Allah, bless Muhammad and his Household,
And spare me the burden of earning,
provide for me without reckoning,
lest I be distracted from Your worship through seeking
And carry the load of earning's ill results!
O Allah,
bestow upon me what I seek through Your power
And grant me sanctuary from what I fear through Your might!
O Allah, bless Muhammad and his Household,
save my face through ease,
And demean not my dignity through neediness,
lest I seek provision from those whom You hast provided
And ask for bestowal from the worst of Your creatures!
And Then I would be tried by praising him who gave to me
afflicted with blaming him who held back from me,

segments.arabic: وَأَنتَ مِن دُونِهِمْ وَلِيُّ الإِعْطَاءِ وَالْمَنْعِ
segments.transliteration: wa anta min dunihim wali-yul-ia'-ta-i wal-man-i'

translation.en: While You— not they— art patron of giving and holding back
O Allah, bless Muhammad and his Household
And provide me with soundness in worship,
detachment in renunciation,
knowledge put into action,
And abstinence in measure!
O Allah, seal my term with Your pardon,

segments.transliteration: wa haq-qiq fi raja-i rah-matika amali

translation.en: verify my expectation in hoping for thy mercy,

segments.transliteration: wa sah-hil ila bulughi rizaka subuli

translation.en: smooth my paths to reach Your good pleasure,

segments.transliteration: wa has-sin fi jamii' ah-wali a'mali

translation.en: And make my works good in all my states!
O Allah, bless Muhammad and his Household,
Incite me to remember You in times of heedlessness,
employ me in Your obedience in days of disregard,

segments.arabic: وَانْهَجْ لِي إِلَى مَحَبَّتِكَ سَبِيلاً سَهْلَةً
segments.transliteration: wan-haj li ila mahab-batika sabilan sah-lah

translation.en: open a smooth road for me to Your love,

segments.arabic: أَكْمِلْ لِي بِهَا خَيْرَ الدُّنيَا وَالآخِرَةِ

translation.en: And complete for me thereby the good of this world and the next!

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَّآلِهِ كَأَفْضَلِ مَا صَلَّيْتَ عَلَى أَحَدٍ مِّنْ خَلْقِكَ قَبْلَهُ وَأَنتَ مُصَلٍّ عَلى أَحَدٍ بَعْدَهُ
segments.transliteration: allahumma sal-li a'la muhammadiw-wa a-lihi ka-af-zali ma sal-layta a'la ahadim min khal-qika qab-lahu wa anta musal-lin a'la ahadim-ba'-dah

translation.en: O Allah, and bless Muhammad and his Household the best You hast blessed any of Your creatures before him and wilt bless any of them after him,

segments.arabic: وَآتِنَا فِي الدُّنْيَا حَسَنَةً وَّفِي الآخِرَةِ حَسَنَةً
segments.transliteration: wa a-tina fid-dunya hasanataw-wa fil-a-khirati hasanah

translation.en: And give to us in this world good, and in the next world good,
And protect me through Your mercy from the chastisement of the Fire!

segments.arabic: إِنَّكَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيٍْء قَدِيرٌ، وَهُوَ عَلَيْكَ يَسِيرٌ
segments.transliteration: in-naka a'la kul-li shay-in qadiruw-wahua a'ilayka yasir

translation.en: You are powerful over everything, and that is easy for You!

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّد عَبْـدِكَ وَرَسُولِـكَ

translation.en: O Allah, send blessings upon Muhammad, Your servant and Your messenger,
and his pure family,

segments.transliteration: wa ikhṣuṣhum bi-afḍali ṣalawātika wa raḥmatik

translation.en: and single them out with the best of Your blessings, and Your mercy,
and Your favors, and Your peace.

segments.transliteration: wa ikhṣuṣi Allāhumma wālidayya bi-al-karāmati ladayk,

translation.en: And single out, O Allah, my parents with honor in Your presence,

segments.transliteration: wa aṣ-ṣalāti minka yā arḥama ar-rāḥimīn.

translation.en: and blessings from You, O Most Merciful of the merciful.
O Allah, send blessings upon Muhammad and his family,

segments.arabic: وَأَلْهِمْنِي عِلْمَ مَا يَجبُ لَهُمَا عَلَىَّ إلْهَاماً،
segments.transliteration: wa alhimnī ‘ilma mā yajibu lahumā ‘alayya ilhāmā,

translation.en: and inspire me with the knowledge of what is due to them from me, an inspiration,

segments.arabic: وَاجْمَعْ لِي عِلْمَ ذلِكَ كُلِّهِ تَمَامـاً،
segments.transliteration: wa ijma‘ lī ‘ilma dhālika kullihī tamāmā,

translation.en: and gather for me the complete knowledge of all of that,
then make me act according to what You inspire me with from it,

segments.arabic: وَوَفِّقْنِي لِلنُّفُوذِ فِيمَا تُبَصِّـرُنِيْ مِنْ عِلْمِهِ،
segments.transliteration: wa waffiqnī li-an-nufūdhi fīmā tubaṣṣirunī min ‘ilmih,

translation.en: and grant me success to penetrate what You give me insight into of its knowledge,

segments.arabic: حَتَّى لاَ يَفُوتَنِي اسْتِعْمَالُ شَيْء عَلَّمْتَنِيْهِ،

translation.en: so that the practice of anything You have taught me does not escape me,

segments.arabic: وَلاَ تَثْقُلَ أَرْكَانِي عَنِ الْحُفُوفِ فِيمَا أَلْهَمْتَنِيهِ.
segments.transliteration: wa lā tathqula arkānī ‘ani al-ḥufūfi fīmā alhamtanīh.

translation.en: and my limbs do not become heavy in carrying out what You have inspired me with.

segments.arabic: أللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّد وَآلِهِ كَمَا شَرَّفْتَنَا بِهِ
segments.transliteration: Allāhumma ṣalli ‘alā Muḥammadin wa ālih kamā sharraftanā bih

translation.en: O Allah, send blessings upon Muhammad and his family, just as You honored us through him,
and send blessings upon Muhammad and his family,

segments.arabic: كَمَا أَوْجَبْتَ لَنَا الْحَقَّ عَلَى الْخَلْقِ بِسَبَبِهِ.
segments.transliteration: kamā awjabta lanā al-ḥaqqa ‘alā al-khalqi bi-sababih.

translation.en: just as You made incumbent upon the creation the right due to us because of him.

segments.arabic: أللَّهُمَّ اجْعَلْنِي أَهَابُهُمَا هَيْبَةَ السُّلْطَانِ الْعَسُوفِ،
segments.transliteration: Allāhumma ij‘alnī ahābuhumā haybata as-sulṭāni al-‘asūf,

translation.en: O Allah, make me regard them with the awe of the fierce ruler,
and be more dutiful to them than the merciful mother,

segments.transliteration: wa ij‘al ṭā‘atī li-wālidayya wa birrī bihimā

translation.en: and make my obedience to my parents and my dutifulness to them
more delightful to my eyes than the sleep of the weary,

segments.transliteration: wa athlaja li-ṣadrī min sharbati aẓ-ẓam’ān

translation.en: and cooler to my chest than the drink of the thirsty,
so that I prefer their desire over my own desire,
and place their pleasure before my own pleasure,

segments.transliteration: wa astakthira birrahumā bī wa in qall

translation.en: and consider my parents' kindness to me to be great, even if it is little,

segments.transliteration: wa astaqilla birrī bihimā wa in kathur.

translation.en: and consider my dutifulness to them to be little, even if it is much.

segments.arabic: أللَّهُمَّ خَفِّضْ لَهُمَا صَوْتِي، وَأَطِبْ لَهُمَا كَلاَمِي،
segments.transliteration: Allāhumma khaffiḍ lahumā ṣawtī, wa aṭib lahumā kalāmī,

translation.en: O Allah, lower my voice before them, and sweeten my speech for them,

segments.arabic: وَأَلِنْ لَهُمَا عَرِيْكَتِي، وَاعْطِفْ عَلَيْهِمَا قَلْبِي،
segments.transliteration: wa alin lahumā ‘arīkatī, wa a‘ṭif ‘alayhimā qalbī,

translation.en: and soften my nature for them, and incline my heart toward them,

segments.transliteration: wa ṣayyirnī bihimā rafīqan, wa ‘alayhimā shafīqan.

translation.en: and make me a gentle companion to them, and a compassionate person toward them.

segments.arabic: أللَّهُمَّ اشْكُرْ لَهُمَا تَرْبِيَتِي وَأَثِبْهُمَا عَلَى تَكْرِمَتِي،
segments.transliteration: Allāhumma ushkur lahumā tarbiyatī wa athibhuma ‘alā takrimatī,

translation.en: O Allah, thank them for raising me, and reward them for honoring me,

segments.arabic: وَاحْفَظْ لَهُمَا مَا حَفِظَاهُ مِنِّي فِي صِغَرِي.
segments.transliteration: wa iḥfaẓ lahumā mā ḥafiẓāhu minnī fī ṣigharī.

translation.en: and preserve for them what they preserved of me in my childhood.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ وَمَا مَسَّهُمَا مِنِّي مِنْ أَذَىً
segments.transliteration: Allāhumma wa mā massahumā minnī min adhā

translation.en: O Allah, and whatever harm touched them from me,

segments.arabic: أَوْ خَلَصَ إلَيْهِمَا عَنِّي مِنْ مَكْرُوه

translation.en: or whatever unpleasant thing reached them from me,

segments.arabic: أَوْ ضَاعَ قِبَلِي لَهُمَا مِنْ حَقٍّ
segments.transliteration: aw ḍā‘a qibalī lahumā min ḥaqqin

translation.en: or whatever right of theirs was lost by me,
then make it a means of relief for their sins,
and a raise in their ranks,
and an increase in their good deeds,

segments.arabic: يَا مُبَدِّلَ السَّيِّئاتِ بِأَضْعَافِهَا مِنَ الْحَسَنَاتِ.
segments.transliteration: yā mubaddila as-sayyi’āti bi-aḍ‘āfihā mina al-ḥasanāt.

translation.en: O You who exchange bad deeds for many times their like in good deeds.

segments.arabic: أللَّهُمَّ وَمَا تَعَدَّيَا عَلَيَّ فِيهِ مِنْ قَوْل،
segments.transliteration: Allāhumma wa mā ta‘addayā ‘alayya fīhi min qawl,

translation.en: O Allah, and whatever word they spoke that went beyond bounds against me,

segments.arabic: أَوْ أَسْرَفَا عَلَىَّ فِيْهِ مِنْ فِعْل،

translation.en: or whatever action they were excessive in against me,
or whatever right of mine they neglected,

segments.arabic: أَوْ قَصَّرا بِي عَنْهُ مِنْ وَاجِب

translation.en: or whatever duty they fell short in towards me,
I have forgiven it and granted it to them generously,

segments.arabic: وَرَغِبْتُ إلَيْكَ فِي وَضْعِ تَبِعَتِهِ عَنْهُمَا
segments.transliteration: wa raghibtu ilayka fī waḍ‘i tabi‘atihi ‘anhumā

translation.en: and I appeal to You to remove its accountability from them,
for I do not accuse them regarding myself,
nor do I consider them slow in their kindness to me,

segments.arabic: وَلا أكْرَهُ مَا تَوَلَّياهُ مِنْ أَمْرِي يَا رَبِّ
segments.transliteration: wa lā akrahu mā tawallayāhu min amrī yā Rabb

translation.en: nor do I dislike what they undertook concerning my affairs, O Lord.
For they have the most incumbent right over me,
and the oldest kindness towards me,
and the greatest favor with me—
than for me to take retribution from them with justice,
or reward them in kind.

segments.arabic: أَيْنَ إذاً يَا إلهِيْ طُولُ شُغْلِهِمَا بِتَرْبِيَتِي ؟
segments.transliteration: ayna idhan yā Ilāhī ṭūlu shughlihimā bi-tarbiyatī?

translation.en: Where then, O my God, is the long effort of their raising me?

segments.transliteration: wa ayna shiddatu ta‘abihimā fī ḥirāsatī?

translation.en: And where is the intensity of their toil in guarding me?

segments.arabic: وَأَيْنَ إقْتَارُهُمَا عَلَى أَنْفُسِهِمَا لِلتَّوْسِعَةِ عَلَيَّ؟

translation.en: And where is their scarcity for themselves in order to provide abundantly for me?
Far be it! They cannot exhaust their right from me,

segments.arabic: وَلاَ اُدْرِكُ مَا يَجِبُ عَلَيَّ لَهُمَا
segments.transliteration: wa lā udriku mā yajibu ‘alayya lahumā

translation.en: nor can I reach what is incumbent upon me for them,

segments.transliteration: wa lā anā bi-qāḍin waẓīfata khidmatihimā.

translation.en: and I am not one who can fulfill the duty of serving them.
So send blessings upon Muhammad and his family,

segments.arabic: وَأَعِنِّي يَا خَيْرَ مَنِ اسْتُعِينَ بِهِ.
segments.transliteration: wa a‘innī yā khayra mani istu‘īna bih.

translation.en: and help me, O Best of those whose help is sought.

segments.arabic: وَوَفِّقْنِي يَا أَهْدَى مَنْ رُغِبَ إلَيْهِ،
segments.transliteration: wa waffiqnī yā ahdā man rughiba ilayh,

translation.en: And grant me success, O Most Guiding of those desired,

segments.arabic: وَلاَ تَجْعَلْنِي فِي أَهْلِ الْعُقُوقِ لِلآباءِوَالأُمَّهاتِ
segments.transliteration: wa lā taj‘alnī fī ahli al-‘uqūqi li-al-ābā’i wa al-ummahāt

translation.en: and do not place me among the people of disobedience to fathers and mothers

segments.arabic: يَوْمَ تُجْزى كُلُّ نَفْس بِمَا كَسَبَتْ وَهُمْ لاَيُظْلَمُونَ.
segments.transliteration: yawma tujzā kullu nafsin bi-mā kasabat wa hum lā yuẓlamūn.

translation.en: on the Day every soul is recompensed for what it earned, and they will not be wronged.

segments.arabic: أللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّد وَآلِـهِ وَذُرِّيَّتِهِ،
segments.transliteration: Allāhumma ṣalli ‘alā Muḥammadin wa ālihī wa dhurrīyatih,

translation.en: O Allah, send blessings upon Muhammad and his family and his descendants,

segments.arabic: وَاخْصُصْ أَبَوَيَّ بِأَفْضَلِ مَا خَصَصْتَ بِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa ikhṣuṣ abawayya bi-afḍali mā khaṣaṣta bih

translation.en: and single out my parents with the best of what You singled out

segments.arabic: آبَاءَ عِبَادِكَ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَاُمَّهَاتِهِمْ يَا أَرْحَمَ الـرَّاحِمِينَ.
segments.transliteration: ābā’a ‘ibādika al-mu’minīna wa ummahātihim yā arḥama ar-rāḥimīn.

translation.en: the fathers of Your believing servants and their mothers, O Most Merciful of the merciful.

segments.arabic: أللَّهُمَّ لاَ تُنْسِنِي ذِكْرَهُمَا فِي أَدْبَارِ صَلَوَاتِي
segments.transliteration: Allāhumma lā tunsīnī dhikrahumā fī adbāri ṣalawātī

translation.en: O Allah, do not make me forget their remembrance at the conclusions of my prayers,

segments.transliteration: wa fī anan min ānā’i laylī,

translation.en: and in any part of the moments of my night,

segments.arabic: وَفِي كُلِّ سَاعَة مِنْ سَاعَاتِ نَهَارِي.
segments.transliteration: wa fī kulli sā‘atin min sā‘āti nahārī.

translation.en: and in every hour of the hours of my day.
O Allah, send blessings upon Muhammad and his family,
and forgive me through my prayer for them,
and forgive them through their dutifulness to me,
a definite forgiveness,

segments.arabic: وَارْضَ عَنْهُمَا بِشَفَاعَتِي لَهُمَا رِضَىً عَزْماً،

translation.en: and be pleased with them through my intercession for them, a resolute pleasure,
and convey them with honor to the abodes of peace.

segments.arabic: أللَّهُمَّ وَإنْ سَبَقَتْ مَغْفِرَتُكَ لَهُمَا فَشَفِّعْهُمَا فِيَّ،
segments.transliteration: Allāhumma wa in sabaqat maghfiratuka lahumā fa-shaffi‘humā fiyy,

translation.en: O Allah, if Your forgiveness preceded them, then make them intercede for me,

segments.arabic: وَإنْ سَبَقَتْ مَغْفِرَتُـكَ لِي فَشَفِّعْنِي فِيْهِمَا،
segments.transliteration: wa in sabaqat maghfiratuka lī fa-shaffi‘nī fīhimā,

translation.en: and if Your forgiveness preceded me, then make me intercede for them,

segments.arabic: حَتّى نَجْتَمِعَ بِرَأفَتِكَ فِي دَارِ كَرَامَتِكَ
segments.transliteration: ḥattā najtami‘a bi-ra’fatika fī dāri karāmatik

translation.en: so that we may gather by Your compassion in the abode of Your honor,
and the place of Your forgiveness and Your mercy.

segments.arabic: إنَّكَ ذُو الْفَضْلِ الْعَظِيمِ وَالْمَنِّ الْقَدِيْمِ
segments.transliteration: innaka dhū al-faḍli al-‘aẓīmi wa al-manni al-qadīm

translation.en: Truly, You are the Possessor of immense favor and ancient bounty,
and You are the Most Merciful of the merciful.
O Allah, and bestow upon me the favor of the survival of my children,

segments.transliteration: wa bi-iṣlāḥihim lī, wa bi-imtā‘ī bihim.

translation.en: and their righteousness towards me, and my enjoyment of them.
My God, prolong their lifespans for me,
and increase their appointed times for me,
and raise their young ones for me,
and strengthen their weak ones for me,

segments.transliteration: wa aṣiḥḥa lī abdānahum wa adyānahum wa akhlāqahum,

translation.en: and make their bodies, their religions, and their characters sound for me,

segments.transliteration: wa ‘āfihim fī anfusihim wa fī jawāriḥihim

translation.en: and grant them well-being in their souls and in their limbs,

segments.arabic: وَفِي كُلِّ مَا عُنِيْتُ بِهِ مِنْ أَمْرِهِمْ،
segments.transliteration: wa fī kulli mā ‘unītu bihi min amrihim,

translation.en: and in everything concerning their affairs that I care about.

segments.transliteration: wa adrir lī wa ‘alā yadī arzāqahum,

translation.en: And abundantly provide their sustenance for me, and by my hand,

segments.transliteration: wa ij‘alhum abrāran atqiyā’a buṣarā’a sāmi‘īn

translation.en: and make them righteous, pious, insightful, listening,

segments.transliteration: muṭī‘īna laka wa li-awliyā’ika muḥibbīna munāṣiḥīn,

translation.en: obedient to You and Your friends, loving, sincere advisors,

segments.transliteration: wa li-jamī‘i a‘dā’ika mu‘ānidīna wa mubghiḍīn. Āmīn.

translation.en: and stubborn and hateful toward all Your enemies. Amen.
O Allah, strengthen my arm with them,
and straighten my crookedness with them,
and increase my number with them,
and adorn my presence with them,
and revive my mention with them,
and suffice me with them in my absence,
and assist me with them in my need,

segments.transliteration: wa ij‘alhum lī muḥibbīna, wa ‘alayya ḥadibīn

translation.en: and make them loving towards me, and kind towards me,
approaching, upright towards me,
obedient, not rebellious,

segments.arabic: وَلاَ عَاقِّينَ وَلا مُخَالِفِينَ وَلاَ خـاطِئِينَ،
segments.transliteration: wa lā ‘āqqīn wa lā mukhālifīna wa lā khāṭi’īn,

translation.en: nor undutiful, nor dissenting, nor sinning.

segments.transliteration: wa a‘innī ‘alā tarbiyatihim wa ta’dībihim wa birrihim,

translation.en: And assist me in raising them, educating them, and being dutiful to them.

segments.arabic: وَهَبْ لِيْ مِنْ لَدُنْكَ مَعَهُمْ أَوْلاداً ذُكُوراً ،
segments.transliteration: wa hab lī min ladunka ma‘ahum awlādan dhukūrā,

translation.en: And grant me from Your presence, along with them, male children,
and make that good for me,

segments.arabic: وَاجْعَلْهُمْ لِي عَوناً عَلَى مَا سَأَلْتُكَ،

translation.en: and make them a help for me in what I asked You for.

segments.transliteration: Wa a‘idhnī wa dhurrīyatī mina ash-shayṭāni ar-rajīm,

translation.en: And grant me and my descendants refuge from the accursed Satan,

segments.transliteration: fa-innaka khalaqtanā wa amartanā wa nahaytanā

translation.en: for You created us, and commanded us, and forbade us,

segments.arabic: وَرَغّبْتَنَا فِي ثَوَابِ مَا أَمَرْتَنَا وَرَهَّبْتَنَا عِقَابَهُ،
segments.transliteration: wa raghhabtanā fī thawābi mā amartanā wa rahhabtanā ‘iqābah,

translation.en: and made us desire the reward for what You commanded us and made us fear its punishment,
and made for us an enemy who plots against us,

segments.arabic: سَلَّطْتَهُ مِنَّا عَلَى مَا لَمْ تُسَلِّطْنَا عَلَيْهِ مِنْهُ،
segments.transliteration: sallaṭtahu minnā ‘alā mā lam tusalliṭnā ‘alayhi minh,

translation.en: whom You have empowered over us in a way that You have not empowered us over him,

segments.transliteration: askantahu ṣudūranā, wa ajraytahu majāriya dimā’inā,

translation.en: You housed him in our hearts, and made him flow in the streams of our blood,

segments.arabic: لاَ يَغْفُلُ إنْ غَفَلْنَا، وَلاَ يَنْسَى إنْ نَسِينَا،
segments.transliteration: lā yaghfulu in ghafalnā, wa lā yansā in nasīnā,

translation.en: he does not become heedless if we become heedless, nor does he forget if we forget.
He makes us feel safe from Your punishment, and frightens us with others besides You.
If we intend a wicked deed, he encourages us to do it,

segments.arabic: وَإنْ هَمَمْنَا بِعَمَل صَالِح ثَبَّطْنَا عَنْهُ،
segments.transliteration: wa in hamamnā bi-‘amalin ṣāliḥin thabbaṭanā ‘anh,

translation.en: and if we intend a righteous deed, he discourages us from it.
He exposes us to lusts,
and sets up doubts for us.
If he promises us, he lies to us,
and if he gives us hope, he breaks his promise.
And unless You turn his plot away from us, he will mislead us,
and unless You guard us from his corruption, he will make us stumble.
O Allah, then subdue his authority over us with Your authority,

segments.arabic: حَتَّى تَحْبِسَهُ عَنَّا بِكَثْرَةِ الدُّعَاءِ لَكَ،

translation.en: until You restrain him from us through the abundance of our prayer to You,

segments.arabic: فَنُصْبحَ مِنْ كَيْدِهِ فِي الْمَعْصُومِينَ بِكَ.
segments.transliteration: fa-nuṣbiḥa min kaydihi fī al-ma‘ṣūmīna bik.

translation.en: so that we become, from his plotting, among those protected by You.
O Allah, grant me every request of mine,
and fulfill my needs for me,

segments.arabic: وَلاَ تَمْنَعْنِي الإجَابَةَ وَقَدْ ضَمِنْتَهَا لِي،
segments.transliteration: wa lā tamna‘nī al-ijābata wa qad ḍamintahā lī,

translation.en: and do not withhold the answer from me, for You have guaranteed it to me,

segments.arabic: وَلا تَحْجُبْ دُعَائِي عَنْكَ وَقَدْ أَمَرْتَنِي بِهِ،
segments.transliteration: wa lā taḥjub du‘ā’ī ‘anka wa qad amartanī bih,

translation.en: and do not veil my supplication from You, for You have commanded me to make it,
and favor me with everything that rectifies me
in my world and my Hereafter,

segments.transliteration: mā dhakartu minhu wa mā nasīt,

translation.en: of what I remembered of it and what I forgot,
or revealed or concealed,
or announced or kept secret.

segments.arabic: وَاجْعَلْنِي فِي جَمِيعِ ذلِكَ مِنَ الْمُصْلِحِينَ بِسُؤَالِي إيَّـاكَ،
segments.transliteration: wa ij‘alnī fī jamī‘i dhālika mina al-muṣliḥīna bi-su’ālī iyyāk,

translation.en: And make me, in all of that, among those who are rectified by asking You,
those who succeed by seeking from You,
those who are not denied due to reliance upon You,
those accustomed to seeking refuge in You,
those who profit in the trade with You,
those granted protection by Your might,
those for whom lawful sustenance is expanded

segments.transliteration: min faḍlika al-wāsi‘i bi-jūdika wa karamik,

translation.en: from Your vast favor, by Your bounty and Your generosity,
those granted honor from humiliation by You,
and those protected from oppression by Your justice,
and those granted well-being from affliction by Your mercy,
and those made rich from poverty by Your wealth,

segments.arabic: وَالْمَعْصومِينَ مِنَ الذُّنُوبِ وَالزَّلَلِ وَالْخَطَأِ بِتَقْوَاكَ،
segments.transliteration: wa al-ma‘ṣūmīna mina adh-dhunūbi wa az-zalali wa al-khaṭa’i bi-taqwāk,

translation.en: and those protected from sins, slipping, and error by Your piety (fear of You),

segments.transliteration: wa al-muwaffaqīna li-al-khayri wa ar-rushdi wa aṣ-ṣawābi bi-ṭā‘atik,

translation.en: and those granted success in goodness, right guidance, and correctness by Your obedience,

segments.transliteration: wa al-muḥāli baynahum wa bayna adh-dhunūbi bi-qudratik,

translation.en: and those between whom and sins You interpose by Your power,
those who abandon every act of disobedience to You,
those dwelling in Your proximity.

segments.arabic: أَللَّهُمَّ أَعْطِنَا جَمِيعَ ذلِكَ بِتَوْفِيقِكَ وَرَحْمَتِكَ
segments.transliteration: Allāhumma a‘ṭinā jamī‘a dhālika bi-tawfīqika wa raḥmatik

translation.en: O Allah, grant us all of that by Your success and Your mercy,
and grant us refuge from the punishment of the Blazing Fire,

segments.transliteration: wa a‘ṭi jamī‘a al-muslimīna wa al-muslimāt

translation.en: and grant all Muslim men and Muslim women,

segments.arabic: وَالْمُؤْمِنِيْنَ وَالْمُؤْمِنَاتِ مِثْلَ الَّذِي سَأَلْتُكَ لِنَفْسِي
segments.transliteration: wa al-mu’minīna wa al-mu’mināti mithla alladhī sa’altuka li-nafsī

translation.en: and believing men and believing women, the like of what I have asked You for myself

segments.arabic: وَلِوُلْدِي فِي عَاجِلِ الدُّنْيَا وَآجِلِ الآخِرَةِ،
segments.transliteration: wa li-wildī fī ‘ājili ad-dunyā wa ājili al-ākhirah,

translation.en: and for my children in the immediate world and the delayed Hereafter.
Truly, You are Near, Responsive, Hearing, Knowing,
Pardoning, Forgiving, Compassionate, Merciful.
And grant us goodness in the world

segments.arabic: وَفِي الآخِرَةِ حَسَنَةً وَقِنَا عَذَابَ النَّارِ.
segments.transliteration: wa fī al-ākhirati ḥasanatan wa qinā ‘adhāba an-nār.

translation.en: and goodness in the Hereafter, and protect us from the punishment of the Fire.

segments.arabic: أَللَّهُمَّ يَا مَنْ لا يَصِفُهُ نَعْتُ الْوَاصِفِينَ ،
segments.transliteration: Allāhumma yā man lā yaṣifuhū na‘tu al-wāṣifīn,

translation.en: O God, O He Whom the description of the describers does not encompass,

segments.arabic: وَيَا مَنْ لاَ يُجَاوِزُهُ رَجَاءُ الرَّاجِينَ ،
segments.transliteration: wa yā man lā yujāwizuhū rajā’u ar-rājīn,

translation.en: O He Whom the hope of the hopeful does not pass by,

segments.arabic: وَيَا مَنْ لاَ يَضِيعُ لَدَيْهِ أَجْرُ الْمُحْسِنِينَ،
segments.transliteration: wa yā man lā yaḍī‘u ladayhī ajru al-muḥsinīn,

translation.en: O He with Whom the reward of the good-doers is not lost,

segments.arabic: وَيَا مَنْ هُوَ مُنْتَهَى خَوْفِ الْعَابِدِيْنَ،
segments.transliteration: wa yā man huwa muntahā khawfi al-‘ābidīn,

translation.en: O He Who is the utmost limit of the fear of the worshippers,

segments.arabic: وَيَا مَنْ هُوَ غَايَةُ خَشْيَةِ الْمُتَّقِينَ.
segments.transliteration: wa yā man huwa ghāyatu khashyati al-muttaqīn.

translation.en: O He Who is the goal of the reverence of the God-fearing.

segments.arabic: هَذا مَقَامُ مَنْ تَدَاوَلَتْهُ أَيْدِي الذُّنُوبِ ،
segments.transliteration: Hadhā maqāmu man tadāwalathu aydī adh-dhunūb,

translation.en: This is the station of him whom the hands of sins have exchanged,
and the reins of errors have led,
and Satan has overcome;
so he fell short in what You commanded by negligence,
and he committed what You forbade by delusion,
like him who is ignorant of Your power over him,
or like him who denies the favour of Your kindness to him.

segments.arabic: حَتَّى إذَا انْفَتَحَ لَهُ بَصَرُ الْهُدَى،
segments.transliteration: Ḥattā idhā infataḥa lahū baṣaru al-hudā,

translation.en: Until when the sight of guidance opened to him,

segments.arabic: وَتَقَشَّعَتْ عَنْهُ سَحَائِبُ الْعَمَى أَحْصَى مَا ظَلَمَ بِهِ نَفْسَهُ،
segments.transliteration: wa taqashsha‘at ‘anhu saḥā’ibu al-‘amā aḥṣā mā ẓalama bihī nafsah,

translation.en: and the clouds of blindness cleared from him, he counted what he had wronged his soul with,

segments.transliteration: wa fakkara fīmā khālafā bihī Rabbah,

translation.en: and he reflected upon what he had opposed his Lord with.

segments.arabic: فَرَأى كَبِيْرَ عِصْيَانِهِ كَبِيْراً، وَجَلِيل مُخَالَفَتِهِ جَلِيْلاً،
segments.transliteration: Fa-ra’ā kabīra ‘iṣyānihī kabīrā, wa jalīla mukhālafatihī jalīlā,

translation.en: So he saw the enormity of his disobedience as immense, and the greatness of his opposition as great.

segments.arabic: فَأَقْبَلَ نَحْوَكَ مُؤَمِّلاً لَكَ، مُسْتَحْيِيَاً مِنْكَ،
segments.transliteration: Fa-aqbala naḥwaka mu’ammilan lak, mustaḥyiyan mink,

translation.en: So he turned toward You, hopeful of You, ashamed before You,

segments.transliteration: wa wajjaha raghbatuhū ilayka thiqatan bik,

translation.en: and directed his desire toward You, trusting in You.

segments.arabic: فَأَمَّكَ بِطَمَعِهِ يَقِيناً، وَقَصَدَكَ بِخَوْفِهِ إخْلاَصَاً،
segments.transliteration: Fa-ammakā bi-ṭama‘ihī yaqīnā, wa qaṣadaka bi-khawfihī ikhlāṣā,

translation.en: So he aimed at You with his greed, having certainty, and intended You with his fear, having sincerity.

segments.arabic: قَدْ خَلاَ طَمَعُهُ مِنْ كُلِّ مَطْمُوع فِيهِ غَيْرِكَ،
segments.transliteration: Qad khalā ṭama‘uhū min kulli maṭmū‘in fīhi ghayrik,

translation.en: His greed has become devoid of every object of greed other than You,

segments.arabic: وَأَفْرَخَ رَوْعُهُ مِنْ كُلِّ مَحْذُور مِنْهُ سِوَاكَ،
segments.transliteration: wa afrakha raw‘uhū min kulli maḥdhūrin minhu siwāk,

translation.en: and his terror has settled from every object of dread other than You.
So he stood before You, imploring,

segments.transliteration: wa ghammaḍa baṣarahū ilā al-arḍi mutakhashshi‘an,

translation.en: and lowered his gaze to the ground, humble,
and bowed his head low to Your Might, submissive,

segments.arabic: وَأَبَثَّكَ مِنْ سِرِّهِ مَا أَنْتَ أَعْلَمُ بِهِ مِنْهُ خَضُوعاً،
segments.transliteration: wa abaththaka min sirrihī mā anta a‘lamu bihī minhu khuḍū‘ā,

translation.en: and scattered before You of his secret what You know better than him, in surrender,

segments.arabic: وَعَدَّدَ مِنْ ذُنُوبِهِ مَا أَنْتَ أَحْصَى لَهَا خُشُوعاً
segments.transliteration: wa ‘addada min dhunūbihī mā anta aḥṣā lahā khushū‘ā

translation.en: and enumerated of his sins what You have counted more exactly, in awe,

segments.arabic: وَاسْتَغَاثَ بِكَ مِنْ عَظِيمِ مَاوَقَعَ بِهِ فِي عِلْمِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa istaghātha bika min ‘aẓīmi mā waqa‘a bihī fī ‘ilmika

translation.en: and sought succour in You from the immensity of what has come to pass through him in Your knowledge,

segments.transliteration: wa qabīḥi mā faḍaḥahū fī ḥukmik

translation.en: and the ugliness of what has disgraced him in Your judgment,
of sins whose pleasures have passed and gone,
but whose consequences remain and have become incumbent.

segments.arabic: لا يُنْكِرُ يَا إلهِي عَدْلَكَ إِنْ عَاقَبْتَهُ،

translation.en: He does not deny, O my God, Your justice if You punish him,

segments.arabic: وَلا يَسْتَعْظِمُ عَفْوَكَ إِنْ عَفَوْتَ عَنْهُ وَرَحِمْتَهُ;
segments.transliteration: wa lā yasta‘ẓimu ‘afwaka in ‘afawta ‘anhu wa raḥimtah;

translation.en: nor does he consider Your pardon great if You pardon him and have mercy on him;
because You are the Noble Lord

segments.arabic: الَّذِي لا يَتَعَاظَمُهُ غُفْرَانُ الذَّنْبِ الْعَظِيم.
segments.transliteration: alladhī lā yata‘āẓamuhū ghufrānu adh-dhambi al-‘aẓīm.

translation.en: Whom the forgiveness of the tremendous sin does not overwhelm.

segments.arabic: أَللَّهُمَّ فَهَا أَنَا ذَا قَدْ جِئْتُكَ مُطِيعاً
segments.transliteration: Allāhumma fa-hā anā dhā qad ji’tuka muṭī‘an

translation.en: O God, behold, here I am, I have come to You obedient

segments.arabic: لِأَمْرِكَ فِيمَا أَمَرْتَ بِهِ مِنَ الدُّعَاءِ،
segments.transliteration: li-amrika fīmā amarta bihī min ad-du‘ā’,

translation.en: to Your command in what You commanded of supplication,

segments.arabic: مُتَنَجِّزاً وَعْدَكَ فِيمَا وَعَدْتَ بِهِ مِنَ الإجَابَةِ إِذْ تَقُولُ
segments.transliteration: mutanajjizan wa‘daka fīmā wa‘adta bihī min al-ijābah idh taqūl:

translation.en: fulfilling Your promise in what You promised of answer when You say:
("Call upon Me; I will respond to you.") [Qur'an 40: 60]
O God, so bless Muhammad and his Household

segments.transliteration: wa alqinī bi-maghfiratika kamā laqītuka bi-iqrārī

translation.en: and encounter me with Your forgiveness as I have encountered You with my confession,

segments.arabic: وَارْفَعْنِي عَنْ مَصَارِعِ الذُّنُوبِ كَمَا وَضَعْتُ لَكَ نَفْسِي
segments.transliteration: wa irfa‘nī ‘an maṣāri‘i adh-dhunūb kamā waḍa‘tu lakā nafsī

translation.en: and raise me up from the downfalls of sins as I have humbled myself before You,

segments.arabic: وَاسْتُرْنِي بِسِتْرِكَ كَمَا تَأَنَّيْتَنِي عَنِ الانْتِقَامِ مِنِّي.
segments.transliteration: wa usturnī bi-sitrika kamā ta’annaytanī ‘ani al-intiqām minnī.

translation.en: and cover me with Your covering as You have been deliberate in taking vengeance against me.

segments.transliteration: Allāhumma wa thabbit fī ṭā‘atika niyyatī,

translation.en: O God, and establish my intention in Your obedience,
and confirm my insight in Your worship,
and grant me success in works

segments.arabic: لِمَا تَغْسِلُ بِهِ دَنَسَ الخَطَايَا عَنِّي،

translation.en: by which You may wash the dirt of errors from me,

segments.transliteration: wa tawaffanī ‘alā millatika wa millati nabiyyik

translation.en: and make me die on Your creed and the creed of Your Prophet
Muḥammad, peace be upon him, when You make me die.

segments.arabic: أَللَّهُمَّ إنِّي أَتُوبُ إلَيْـكَ فِي مَقَامِي هَذَا
segments.transliteration: Allāhumma innī atūbu ilayka fī maqāmī hādhā

translation.en: O God, I repent to You in this station of mine
from the major sins of mine and the minor,
and the hidden evil acts of mine and the manifest,
and the past slips of mine and the recent,

segments.arabic: تَوْبَةَ مَنْ لا يُحَدِّثُ نَفْسَهُ بِمَعْصِيَةٍ
segments.transliteration: tawbata man lā yuḥaddithu nafsahū bi-ma‘ṣiyah

translation.en: the repentance of one who does not talk to himself of an act of disobedience

segments.arabic: وَلاَ يُضْمِرُ أَنْ يَعُودَ فِي خَطِيئَةٍ،
segments.transliteration: wa lā yuḍmiru an ya‘ūda fī khaṭī’ah,

translation.en: and does not hide the intention to return to an error.

segments.arabic: وَقَدْ قُلْتَ يَا إلهِي فِي مُحْكَمِ كِتابِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa qad qulta yā Ilāhī fī muḥkami kitābika

translation.en: For You have said, O my God, in the firm text of Your Book,
that You accept the repentance of Your servants,

segments.transliteration: wa ta‘fū ‘ani as-sayyi’āt, wa tuḥibbu at-tawwābīn,

translation.en: and pardon evil deeds, and love the repenters.

segments.arabic: فَاقْبَلْ تَوْبَتِي كَمَا وَعَدْتَ وَأعْفُ عَنْ سَيِّئاتِي كَمَا ضَمِنْتَ،
segments.transliteration: Fa-iqbal tawbatī kamā wa‘adta wa u‘fu ‘an sayyi’ātī kamā ḍaminta,

translation.en: So accept my repentance as You promised, and pardon my evil deeds as You guaranteed,

segments.transliteration: wa awjib lī maḥabbatika kamā sharaṭt,

translation.en: and make Your love incumbent upon me as You stipulated,

segments.arabic: وَلَـكَ يَـا رَبِّ شَـرْطِي أَلاّ أَعُودَ فِي مَكْرُوهِكَ،
segments.transliteration: wa lakā yā Rabbi sharṭī allā a‘ūda fī makrūhik,

translation.en: And Yours, O Lord, is my stipulation that I will not return to what You dislike,

segments.transliteration: wa ḍamānī allā arji‘a fī madhmūmik,

translation.en: and my guarantee that I will not revert to what You blame,
and my covenant that I will abandon all acts of disobedience to You.

segments.arabic: أَللَّهُمَّ إنَّكَ أَعْلَمُ بِمَا عَمِلْتُ فَاغْفِرْ لِي مَا عَلِمْتَ،
segments.transliteration: Allāhumma innaka a‘lamu bi-mā ‘amiltu fa-ighfir lī mā ‘alimt,

translation.en: O God, surely You know better what I have done, so forgive me what You know,

segments.transliteration: wa iṣrifnī bi-qudratika ilā mā aḥbabt.

translation.en: and divert me by Your power to what You love.
O God, and incumbent upon me are consequences that I have guarded,
and consequences that I have forgotten,

segments.transliteration: wa kulluhunna bi-‘aynika allatī lā tanām,

translation.en: and all of them are in Your eye that does not sleep,
and Your knowledge that does not forget;

segments.arabic: فَعَوِّضْ مِنْهَا أَهْلَهَا وَاحْطُطْ عَنّي وِزْرَهَا،

translation.en: so compensate their owners for them, and put down their burden from me,

segments.arabic: وَخَفِّفْ عَنِّي ثِقْلَهَا، وَاعْصِمْنِي مِنْ أَنْ اُقَارِفَ مِثْلَهَا.
segments.transliteration: wa khaffif ‘annī thiqlahā, wa i‘ṣimnī min an uqārifa mithlahā.

translation.en: and lighten their weight from me, and protect me from committing their like.

segments.arabic: أَللَّهُمَّ وَإنَّهُ لاَ وَفَاءَ لِي بِالتَّوْبَةِ إلاَّ بِعِصْمَتِكَ،
segments.transliteration: Allāhumma wa innahū lā wafā’a lī bi-at-tawbati illā bi-‘iṣmatik,

translation.en: O God, surely there is no fulfillment for me in repentance save by Your protection,

segments.arabic: وَلا اسْتِمْسَاكَ بِي عَنِ الْخَطَايَا إلاَّ عَنْ قُوَّتِكَ،
segments.transliteration: wa lā istimsāka bī ‘ani al-khaṭāyā illā ‘an quwwatik,

translation.en: and no holding back for me from errors save by Your strength,

segments.arabic: فَقَوِّنِي بِقُوَّة كَافِيَة، وَتَوَلَّنِي بِعِصْمَة مَانِعَة.
segments.transliteration: fa-qawwinī bi-quwwatin kāfiyah, wa tawallanī bi-‘iṣmatin māni‘ah.

translation.en: so strengthen me with a sufficient power, and assume authority over me with a preventive protection.
O God, any servant who repents to You,

segments.arabic: وَهُوَ فِي عِلْمِ الْغَيْبِ عِنْدَكَ فَاسِخٌ لِتَوْبَتِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa huwa fī ‘ilmi al-ghayb ‘indak fāsikhun li-tawbatih

translation.en: while in the knowledge of the unseen with You he is one who will break his repentance
and return to his sin and his error—

segments.arabic: فَإنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ أنْ أَكُوْنَ كَذلِكَ،
segments.transliteration: fa-innī a‘ūdhu bika an akūna kadhālik,

translation.en: surely I seek refuge in You from being like that.

segments.arabic: فَاجْعَلْ تَوْبَتِي هَذِهِ تَوْبَةً لا أَحْتَاجُ بَعْدَهَا إلَى تَوْبَة،
segments.transliteration: Fa-ij‘al tawbatī hādhihī tawbatan lā aḥtāju ba‘dahā ilā tawbah,

translation.en: So make this repentance of mine a repentance after which I will not need a repentance,

segments.arabic: تَوْبَةً مُوجِبَةً لِمَحْوِ مَا سَلَفَ، وَالسَّلاَمَةِ فِيمَـا بَقِيَ.
segments.transliteration: tawbatan mūjibatan li-maḥwi mā salaf, wa as-salāmah fīmā baqī.

translation.en: a repentance that necessitates the wiping out of what has passed, and safety in what remains.

segments.arabic: أَللَّهُمَّ إنِّي أَعْتَـذِرُ إلَيْـكَ مِنْ جَهْلِي،
segments.transliteration: Allāhumma innī a‘tadhiru ilayka min jahlī,

translation.en: O God, I apologize to You for my ignorance,
and I ask You for a gift to cover my evil deed,
so join me to the protection of Your mercy out of bounty,
and cover me with the covering of Your well-being out of grace.
O God, I repent to You
from everything that opposes Your Will,
or turns away from Your Love,
whether it be from the thoughts of my heart,
and the glances of my eye,
and the narrations of my tongue,

segments.arabic: تَوْبَةً تَسْلَمُ بِهَا كُلُّ جَارِحَة عَلَى حِيَالِهَا مِنْ تَبِعَاتِكَ،
segments.transliteration: tawbatan taslamu bihā kullu jāriḥatin ‘alā ḥiyālihā min tabi‘ātik,

translation.en: a repentance by which every limb, singly, is preserved from Your consequences,

segments.arabic: وَتَأْمَنُ مِمَّا يَخَافُ الْمُعْتَدُونَ مِنْ أَلِيْمِ سَطَوَاتِكَ.
segments.transliteration: wa ta’manu mimmā yakhāfu al-mu‘tadūn min alīm saṭawātik.

translation.en: and is safe from what the transgressors fear of Your painful assaults.
O God, then have mercy on my solitude before You,
and the throbbing of my heart from Your reverence,
and the trembling of my limbs from Your awe.

segments.arabic: فَقَدْ أَقَامَتْنِي يَا رَبِّ ذُنُوبِي مَقَامَ الْخِزْيِ بِفِنَائِكَ،
segments.transliteration: Fa-qad aqāmatnī yā Rabbi dhunūbī maqām al-khizy bi-finā’ik,

translation.en: For surely, O Lord, my sins have made me stand in the station of ignominy at Your door,

segments.arabic: فَإِنْ سَكَتُّ لَمْ يَنْطِقْ عَنِّي أَحَدٌ،

translation.en: so if I am silent, no one will speak on my behalf,

segments.transliteration: wa in shafa‘tu fa-lastu bi-ahli ash-shafā‘ah.

translation.en: and if I intercede, I am not worthy of intercession.
O God, bless Muhammad and his Household,
and make Your Generosity an intercessor for my errors,
and revert to my evil deeds with Your pardon,
and do not repay me my full recompense with Your punishment,

segments.transliteration: wa ubṣuṭ ‘alayya ṭawlak wa jallilnī bi-sitrik,

translation.en: and spread over me Your favor and cover me with Your covering,

segments.arabic: وَافْعَلْ بِي فِعْلَ عَزِيزٍ تَضَرَّعَ إلَيْهِ عَبْدٌ ذَلِيلٌ فَرَحِمَهُ،
segments.transliteration: wa if‘al bī fi‘la ‘azīzin taḍarra‘a ilayhi ‘abdun dhalīlun fa-raḥimah,

translation.en: and deal with me with the dealing of a Mighty One to whom a lowly servant implored and he had mercy on him,

segments.arabic: أَوْ غَنِيٍّ تَعَرَّضَ لَهُ عَبْدٌ فَقِيرٌ فَنَعَشَهُ.
segments.transliteration: aw ghaniyyin ta‘arraḍa lahū ‘abdun faqīrun fa-na‘ashah.

translation.en: or a Rich One to whom a poor servant exposed himself and he revived him.

segments.arabic: أَللَّهُمَّ لاَ خَفِيرَ لِي مِنْكَ فَلْيَخْفُرْنِيْ عِزُّكَ،
segments.transliteration: Allāhumma lā khafīra lī minka fa-līakhfurnī ‘izzuk,

translation.en: O God, there is no one who can grant me protection from You, so let Your Might protect me,

segments.arabic: وَلا شَفِيعَ لِيْ إلَيْكَ فَلْيَشْفَعْ لِي فَضْلُكَ،
segments.transliteration: wa lā shafī‘a lī ilayka fa-līashfa‘ lī faḍluk,

translation.en: and no intercessor for me before You, so let Your Favor intercede for me,
and my errors have frightened me, so let Your Pardon grant me security.

segments.arabic: فَمَا كُلُّ مَا نَطَقْتُ بِهِ عَنْ جَهْلٍ مِنِّي بِسُوْءِ أَثَرِي،
segments.transliteration: Fa-mā kullu mā naṭaqtu bihī ‘an jahl minnī bi-sū’i atharī,

translation.en: For not all that I have spoken is from my ignorance of the evil effect of my deeds,

segments.arabic: وَلاَ نِسيَانٍ لِمَا سَبَقَ مِنْ ذَمِيمِ فِعْلِي،
segments.transliteration: wa lā nisyān li-mā sabaqa min dhamīm fi‘lī,

translation.en: nor forgetfulness of what has preceded of my blameworthy action,

segments.transliteration: wa lākin li-tasma‘a samā’uka wa man fīhā,

translation.en: but so that Your Heaven and whoever is in it may hear,

segments.arabic: وَأَرْضُكَ وَمَنْ عَلَيْهَا مَا أَظْهَرْتُ لَكَ مِنَ النَّدَمِ،
segments.transliteration: wa arḍuka wa man ‘alayhā mā aẓhartu lakā mina an-nadam,

translation.en: and Your Earth and whoever is upon it may hear what I have revealed to You of remorse,

segments.transliteration: wa laja’tu ilayka fīhī mina at-tawbah,

translation.en: and what I have taken refuge in You for, of repentance,

segments.arabic: فَلَعَـلَّ بَعْضَهُمْ بِرَحْمَتِكَ يَرْحَمُنِي لِسُوءِ مَوْقِفِي،
segments.transliteration: fa-la‘alla ba‘ḍahum bi-raḥmatika yarḥamunī li-sū’i mawqifī,

translation.en: so that perhaps some of them, through Your mercy, may have mercy on me because of my evil stance,

segments.arabic: أَوْ تُدْرِكُهُ الرِّقَّةُ عَلَىَّ لِسُوءِ حَالِي

translation.en: or a softness may overtake them toward me because of my evil state,

segments.arabic: فَيَنَالَنِي مِنْهُ بِدَعْوَةٍ أَسْمَعُ لَدَيْكَ مِنْ دُعَائِي،
segments.transliteration: fa-yanālanī minhu bi-da‘watin asma‘u ladayka min du‘ā’ī,

translation.en: and so I may gain from them a prayer more heard with You than my prayer,

segments.arabic: أَوْ شَفَاعَـةٍ أَوْكَدُ عِنْدَكَ مِنْ شَفَاعَتِي

translation.en: or an intercession more certain with You than my intercession,

segments.arabic: تَكُونُ بِهَا نَجَاتِي مِنْ غَضَبِكَ وَفَوْزَتِي بِرِضَاكَ.
segments.transliteration: takūnu bihā najātī min ghaḍabika wa fawzatī bi-riḍāk.

translation.en: by which will be my deliverance from Your wrath and my triumph with Your pleasure.

segments.arabic: أَللَّهُمَّ إِنْ يَكُنِ النَّدَمُ تَوْبَةً إِلَيْكَ فَأَنَا أَنْدَمُ اْلنَّادِمِينَ،
segments.transliteration: Allāhumma in yakuni an-nadamu tawbatan ilayka fa-anā andamu an-nādimīn,

translation.en: O God, if remorse is repentance to You, then I am the most remorseful of the remorseful,

segments.arabic: وَإِنْ يَكُنِ التَّرْكُ لِمَعْصِيَتِكَ إِنَابَةً فَأَنَا أَوَّلُ الْمُنِيبينَ،
segments.transliteration: wa in yakuni at-tarku li-ma‘ṣiyatika inābatan fa-anā awwalu al-munībīn,

translation.en: and if the forsaking of disobedience to You is turning back, then I am the first of those who turn back,

segments.arabic: وَإِنْ يَكُنِ الاسْتِغْفَارُ حِطَّةً لِلذُّنُوبِ فَإِنَي لَكَ مِنَ الْمُسْتَغْفِرِينَ.
segments.transliteration: wa in yakuni al-istighfāru ḥiṭṭatan li-adh-dhunūbi fa-innī laka mina al-mustaghfirīn.

translation.en: and if seeking forgiveness is a remission of sins, then I am among those who seek forgiveness before You.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ فَكَمَا أَمَرْتَ بِالتَّوْبَةِ وَضَمِنْتَ الْقَبُولَ
segments.transliteration: Allāhumma fa-kamā amarta bi-at-tawbah wa ḍaminta al-qabūl

translation.en: O God, just as You commanded repentance and guaranteed acceptance,

segments.transliteration: wa ḥathathta ‘alā ad-du‘ā’ wa wa‘adta al-ijābah,

translation.en: and urged to supplication and promised response,

segments.arabic: فَصَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدِ وَآلِهِ وَاقْبَلْ تَوْبَتِي
segments.transliteration: fa-ṣalli ‘alā Muḥammad wa ālihī wa iqbal tawbatī

translation.en: so bless Muhammad and his Household, and accept my repentance,

segments.arabic: وَلاَ تَرْجِعْني مَرجَعَ الخَيبَةِ منْ رَحْمَتِك
segments.transliteration: wa lā tarji‘nī marja‘a al-khaybah min raḥmatik

translation.en: and do not return me to the place of disappointment from Your mercy.
Surely You are the Relenting One toward the sinners,
and the Merciful to the erring ones who turn back.

segments.arabic: أَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّد وَآلِهِ كَمَا هَدَيْتَنَا بِهِ
segments.transliteration: Allāhumma ṣalli ‘alā Muḥammad wa ālihī kamā hadaytanā bih

translation.en: O God, bless Muhammad and his Household, just as You guided us through him,

segments.arabic: وَصَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّد وَآلِهِ كَمَا اسْتَنْقَذْتَنَا بِهِ،
segments.transliteration: wa ṣalli ‘alā Muḥammad wa ālihī kamā istanqadhtanā bih,

translation.en: and bless Muhammad and his Household, just as You rescued us through him,
and bless Muhammad and his Household

segments.arabic: صَلاَةً تَشْفَعُ لَنَا يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ وَيَوْمَ الْفَاقَةِ إلَيْكَ،
segments.transliteration: ṣalātan tashfa‘u lanā yawm al-qiyāmah wa yawm al-fāqah ilayk,

translation.en: with a blessing that intercedes for us on the Day of Resurrection and the Day of our utter need for You.

segments.arabic: إنَّكَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْء قَدِيرٌ وَهُوَ عَلَيْكَ يَسِيرٌ .
segments.transliteration: innaka ‘alā kulli shay’in qadīr wa huwa ‘alayka yasīr.

translation.en: Surely You are powerful over everything, and that is easy for You.
